tracks.rawText: 3:57Verso 1v5Un vals romántico latino en 3/4, con trío de guitarras acústicas alternando delicados arpegios y suaves rasgueos, Harmonías vocales emotivas, con voces que se entrelazan cálidas y nostálgicas, El ritmo lento a medio brinda una atmósfera nocturna y de serenata, La melodía, melancólica y apasionada, evoca la tradición de bolero y vals mexicano, resaltando la interpretación íntima y sentimentalPublishRemix
tracks.title: Verso 1

tracks.rawText: 4:49dannyv5Vals romántico latino, estilo bolero clásico de trío de guitarras, tempo lento a medio en compás 3/4, guitarras acústicas con rasgueo suave y arpegios elegantes, armonías vocales cálidas y nostálgicas, interpretación íntima y sentimental, atmósfera de serenata nocturna, melodía melancólica y apasionada, inspiración en valses y boleros tradicionales mexicanos de mediados del siglo XXPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 4:53[Rec] Mar 16 22:01:54 (Remastered)v5CoverA haunting blend of Gregorian chant melodies layered over deep, pulsating modern psytrance beats, Spacious synth textures and atmospheric pads weave between intricate percussion, while distorted basslines add intensity, Sections shift between choral focus and driving electronic energy, merging ancient choral sound with contemporary psytrancePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:29[Rec] Mar 16 22:01:54 (Remastered)v5CoverThe song opens with deep, resonant Gregorian chant harmonies, layered a cappella to create a majestic choral texture, Sparse, droning organ notes underscore the vocals in the chorus, while subtle hand percussion adds depth, Each section crescendos, evoking spiritual grandeur1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:23[Rec] Mar 16 22:01:54 (Remastered)v5A high-energy, modern electronic dance track characterized by a heavy, syncopated bassline and a driving four-on-the-floor kick drum, The production features aggressive, distorted synth stabs and rhythmic vocal chops that function as a melodic hook, The tempo is approximately 126 BPM, set in a minor key to provide a dark, club-oriented atmosphere, The arrangement utilizes tension-building risers and percussive fills leading into a powerful drop where the sub-bass and industrial-leaning textures dominate the mix, High-end percussion includes crisp open hi-hats and sharp claps, while the overall sonic profile is polished with heavy compression and sidechaining to the kick2PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Mar 16 22:01:54 (Remastered)
